industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Northern Power Systems Corp.
summary: Northern Power Systems Corp. designs, manufactures, and services wind turbine platforms for the distributed wind market worldwide. The company provides 100 kW and 60 kW turbines under the NPS 100 and NPS 60 names. It also offers power converters for battery energy storage applications under the FlexPhase brand; and technical support for its SmartView supervisory control and data acquisition system. Northern Power Systems Corp. was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Barre, Vermont.
